evidence_summary: The scene must capture the scale of the Thark expeditionary force in motion while maintaining an intimate focus on John Carter's internal psychological state. The visual language should contrast the massive, rhythmic movement of the marching column with the...

As the expeditionary force begins its march toward Thark, John Carter reflects on his deep love for Dejah Thoris and the agonizing misunderstanding caused by Barsoomian social customs that have led to her coldness toward him.
Wide shots of the marching column (scale and movement)
Direction of march must remain consistent across shots
